name: @salary-hijacking/config
description: Shared ESLint, Prettier and TypeScript configuration package for the Salary Hijacking monorepo.

scripts.validate: corepack pnpm run validate:json && corepack pnpm run validate:exports && corepack pnpm run validate:eslint && corepack pnpm run validate:prettier && corepack pnpm run validate:typescript && corepack pnpm run validate:policy
scripts.validate:json: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('typescript/base.json','utf8')); console.log('[config] json validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:exports: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['./eslint/base','./prettier','./prettier/config','./typescript/base','./typescript/base.json','./package.json']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg.exports)); if(missing.length){console.error('[config] missing exports:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} const files=['eslint/base.js','prettier/prettier.config.js','typescript/base.json']; const absent=files.filter((file)=>!fs.existsSync(file)); if(absent.length){console.error('[config] missing config files:', absent.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[config] export map validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:eslint: node --check eslint/base.js && node -e "import('./eslint/base.js').then((m)=>{ if(!Array.isArray(m.default)) throw new Error('eslint default export must be an array'); if(!m.baseConfig) throw new Error('eslint named baseConfig export missing'); if(!m.salaryHijackingPolicy) throw new Error('salaryHijackingPolicy export missing'); console.log('[config] eslint config import validation passed.'); }).catch((error)=>{ console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.validate:prettier: node --check prettier/prettier.config.js && node -e "import('./prettier/prettier.config.js').then((m)=>{ if(!m.default) throw new Error('prettier default export missing'); if(m.default.printWidth!==100) throw new Error('prettier printWidth must be 100'); if(m.default.tabWidth!==2) throw new Error('prettier tabWidth must be 2'); if(m.default.endOfLine!=='lf') throw new Error('prettier endOfLine must be lf'); if(!Array.isArray(m.default.overrides)) throw new Error('prettier overrides must be an array'); if(!m.salaryHijackingPrettierPolicy) throw new Error('salaryHijackingPrettierPolicy export missing'); console.log('[config] prettier config import validation passed.'); }).catch((error)=>{ console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.validate:typescript: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const json=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('typescript/base.json','utf8')); const c=json.compilerOptions; const required={strict:true,noImplicitAny:true,strictNullChecks:true,exactOptionalPropertyTypes:true,noUncheckedIndexedAccess:true,noImplicitOverride:true,noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature:true,forceConsistentCasingInFileNames:true,isolatedModules:true,verbatimModuleSyntax:true,noEmit:true}; for(const [key,value] of Object.entries(required)){ if(c[key]!==value){ console.error('[config] TypeScript option mismatch:', key, 'expected', value, 'actual', c[key]); process.exit(1); }} if(c.target!=='ES2022') throw new Error('target must be ES2022'); if(c.module!=='ESNext') throw new Error('module must be ESNext'); if(c.moduleResolution!=='Bundler') throw new Error('moduleResolution must be Bundler'); console.log('[config] TypeScript base validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:policy: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const policy=pkg.salaryHijacking; const bad=[]; if(policy.packageRole!=='shared-config-package') bad.push('packageRole'); if(policy.finalStatus!=='file_unit_100_percent_document_theoretical_complete') bad.push('finalStatus'); if(policy.securityContract.rawFinancialDataInLogsAllowed!==false) bad.push('rawFinancialDataInLogsAllowed'); if(policy.securityContract.rawTokenInResponseAllowed!==false) bad.push('rawTokenInResponseAllowed'); if(policy.securityContract.rawSecretInResponseAllowed!==false) bad.push('rawSecretInResponseAllowed'); if(policy.qualityContract.strictTypeScriptRequired!==true) bad.push('strictTypeScriptRequired'); if(policy.qualityContract.eslintFlatConfigRequired!==true) bad.push('eslintFlatConfigRequired'); if(policy.qualityContract.prettier3Required!==true) bad.push('prettier3Required'); if(bad.length){ console.error('[config] policy validation failed:', bad.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } console.log('[config] policy validation passed.');"
